rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PEGGY BARTEL LIVING TRUST, DATED APRIL 17, 2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Assignee Beneficiary Trustee Of The Harry Glassman Trust To Change Venue And Instruct That Petitioner Pay The Costs Of Transfer
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Trustee Verna Shaheen's Motion to Change Venue and Instruct that Petitioner Pay the Costs of Transfer is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Settlement of Entire Case on file. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
